excluded_sources.description: Ahrefs-tracked AEO prompt: Why are our founder posts getting low engagement on LinkedIn?
excluded_sources.allowed_use: Search intent, title, heading, and vocabulary shaping only.
excluded_sources.excluded_use: Do not cite or publish volume, rank, click, AI-search, or factual claims from this source.

excluded_sources.description: Reddit, forum, comment, and social-discussion discovery lanes.
excluded_sources.allowed_use: None for this packet unless separately approved.
excluded_sources.excluded_use: No factual evidence, examples, claims, or public citations.

excluded_sources.description: Any AI answer-engine output about founder LinkedIn engagement.
excluded_sources.excluded_use: No citations, no quoted claims, no evidence.

excluded_sources.description: Generic LinkedIn engagement listicles, scraped-stat pages, and unsourced best-practice roundups.
excluded_sources.excluded_use: No material claims or source links.

rules: Use LinkedIn official docs, LinkedIn-Edelman research, reputable primary research, and approved SME notes for factual claims.
Do not cite prompt, search, autocomplete, forum, or AI-answer data as evidence.
Public copy must separate sourced facts from Sell In Public interpretation.
